citations.desc: Attending veterinarian and adequate veterinary care (dealers and exhibitors).
citations.narrative:
A male Cavalier King Charles (tag #0292) had an open wound on its neck. Upon closer examination, it became obvious
that dog's chain had become embedded and has cut into the skin. The licensee had not observed this prior to inspection.
An embedded chain that cuts into the skin can cause infection and can be painful. The licensee must observe all dogs on
a daily basis to make sure things like tight chains are caught before they start embedding into the skin. Correct starting on
9/12/25.
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with the licensee.
End of report.
n

narrative:
2.40(b)(3)  Direct
   
Attending veterinarian and adequate veterinary care (dealers and exhibitors). 
A male Cavalier King Charles (tag #0292) had an open wound on its neck. Upon closer examination, it became obvious 
that dog's chain had become embedded and has cut into the skin. The licensee had not observed this prior to inspection. 
An embedded chain that cuts into the skin can cause infection and can be painful. The licensee must observe all dogs on 
a daily basis to make sure things like tight chains are caught before they start embedding into the skin. Correct starting on 
9/12/25. 
 
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with the licensee. 
 
End of report. 
 
 n
